items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★4 The game has absurd potential; the story
items.summary: The game has absurd potential; the story and gameplay are fantastic. However, I am facing constant freezing issues. The game crashes when I skip the story, proceed to the next page, or use the 4x speed (the freeze happens right after the dialogue ends, upon returning to the main menu). To fix this, I have to force close and reopen the app, which is quite frustrating. Regarding the PT-BR translation: I highly appreciate the developers for the beta version, but I think it's time for an official.
items.author: Jardeson Olivier
